abilities.name: Freikorps Suit
abilities.description: Ignores all damage from pulse and blast effects.

abilities.name: Unimpeded
abilities.description: Ignores terrain penalties when taking Movement Actions.

actions: (1) Hunting Knife (Labor) | AV: 5 (11) | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/3/4 damage. Ram Critical Strike: +1 per Ram. Tome Duck & Weave: +2 Defense until start of next turn.
(1) Clockwork Pistol (Pistol) | AV: 6 (12) | Rg: z12 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/4/5 damage. Capacity 6, Reload 2. Ram Critical Strike: +1 per Ram. Mask Reposition: Move up to 3 yards.
(0) Freikorps Tactics | Discard card to add suit of choice to every duel until start of next turn.
system.notes: Rank-and-file Freikorps trained and tested as cohesive units. Know fallen ally will be cared for by Von Schill.
